case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. MYUNG HUH et al

docket_entries.description: RESPONSE TO OSC FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT HUH, MYUNG IND/DBA Q & S CLEANERS

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT HUH, MYUNG IND/DBA Q & S CLEANERS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-03-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-04-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-05-2002
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CAUSE CALLED, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUH, MYUNG IND/DBA Q & S CLEANERS POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: ONE FULTON 15HPFB-015-A GAS FIRED BOILER;ONE AJAX CABINET BAG SLEEVER CBS-X, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $5,500.00, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $15,200.32 DAMAGES, $1,850.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $173.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,223.32, INTEREST $488.52. TOTAL JUDGMENT $17711.84. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED MAR-20-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUH, MYUNG IND/DBA Q & S CLEANERS

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $173.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT HUH, MYUNG IND/DBA Q & S CLEANERS
